bonus_skill_points_rules.hobby_skill: Allow the character the option of choosing one final new Combat Style or Professional Skill, reflecting a personal hobby or interest
bonus_skill_points_rules.distribution: Distribute points amongst whatever skills the character currently has; increasing each skill by 1% for every point spent on improving it
bonus_skill_points_rules.restriction: Save for the optional hobby skill, no points may be assigned to those Combat Styles or Professional Skills not learned as part of their Culture or Career
bonus_skill_points_rules.max_note: No individual skill can receive more points than indicated by their Age Category
